texto: You just don't have the time to worry about what others are doing. You just want to take care of your own business. You are focused on that tee shot on the 10th tee and making it to the finish line. It's one of the most stressful moments in professional golf, but you have worked so hard to get to that point, that it really is fun.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Weir sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You just don't have the time to worry about what others are doing. You just want to take care of …” articula tempo, time, golf em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e golf.

frase_original: You just don't have the time to worry about what others are doing. You just want to take care of your own business. You are focused on that tee shot on the 10th tee and making it to the finish line. It's one of the most stressful moments in professional golf, but you have worked so hard to get to that point, that it really is fun.
